name: I'm on an Office Ceiling
hints: On the office ceiling - spider-sense tingling! Air intake mesh and strange mist below.
GO MESH to enter the duct system. The mist below may be dangerous.
Air intake mesh leads to ducts (room 7). DOWN drops to floating area (room 18). Strange mist is atmospheric.
notes: Office ceiling. Air mesh connects to duct (room 7). DOWN to floating area (room 18).
